title: psychotria boraginoides
intro: Psychotria boraginoides, also known as the "Pride of Hawaii," is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Psychotria boraginoides include relief from fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
